meaning.vi: song praising the virtues of the Buddha, chanting of Buddhist hymns
meaning.en: song praising the virtues of the Buddha, chanting of Buddhist hymns

meaning.vi: song, singing, classical Japanese poem (esp. tanka), modern poetry
meaning.en: song, singing, classical Japanese poem (especially tanka), modern poetry

meaning.vi: to sing, to sing of (love, beauty, etc.) in a poem, to express in the form of a poem, to recite (a poem)
meaning.en: to sing, to sing of (love, beauty, etc.) in a poem, to express in poetic form, to recite a poem

meaning.vi: long epic song with shamisen accompaniment (developed in Edo in the early 17th century)
meaning.en: long epic song with shamisen accompaniment (developed in Edo in the early 17th century)
